title: White House kills AI safety order as governance reshuffles - TCR 05/22/26
description:
The White House killed a draft executive order requiring 90-day pre-deployment safety testing of frontier AI models hours before the announced signing, London Mayor Sadiq Khan blocked a £50 million Metropolitan Police contract with Palantir over absent competitive tender, and an OpenAI reasoning model disproved an 80-year-old Erdős conjecture on planar unit distances that mathematicians had not cracked since 1946.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-may-22-2026/

0:00 OpenAI disproves 80-year-old Erdős conjecture
2:00 White House kills AI security executive order
4:28 London mayor blocks Palantir Met Police contract
6:50 The 1946 Conjecture That Just Fell
9:53 Spotify and Universal launch licensed AI remix architecture
12:41 Graduates boo AI commencement speeches as OpenAI hires crisis strategist
16:12 Close

This episode covers the pulled Trump AI security executive order and the House bill to preempt state AI safety laws for two years, London's mayoral veto of the Palantir Met Police contract and what it sets as precedent for UK AI procurement, OpenAI's reasoning-model disproof of a 1946 Erdős conjecture, the first Spotify and Universal Music licensing framework for AI covers from Taylor Swift and Ariana Grande catalog, SpaceX's S-1 disclosure of Anthropic paying $15 billion annualized to Colossus plus $2.8 billion in gas turbines, graduates booing AI inevitability speeches at multiple US universities, and WiseTech's two-jurisdiction termination notice asymmetry.

The killed executive order would have routed safety testing through NSA and Treasury. Its absence routes verification through what the labs publish voluntarily, and the D.C. Circuit spent last week pressing whether punishing those publications is constitutional. London's £50 million Palantir block inserts a democratic veto upstream of police AI deployment in the capital city with the country's largest force. The OpenAI Erdős disproof is the first time a publicly-deployed reasoning system has overturned a long-standing open conjecture from the mainstream literature with a construction small enough for human verification by hand. The Spotify-Universal deal extends the consent architecture threaded through the May 13 Human Consent Standard and the May 3 Academy Oscar eligibility ruling. SpaceX's S-1 filing made the financial substrate of frontier compute legible at granularity that did not previously exist on the public record. Graduates at the University of Arizona, UCF, and Middle Tennessee State booed CEOs framing AI adoption as obligation, and OpenAI's hire of crisis strategist Chris Lehane is the inside of the same trade.
